50 using namespace Arcane;
51 using namespace Arcane::FemUtils;
52 namespace ax = Arcane::Accelerator;
53 
54 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
62 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
63 
64 class FemModulePoisson
65 : public ArcaneFemPoissonObject
66 {
67  public:
68 
69  explicit FemModulePoisson(const ModuleBuildInfo& mbi)
70  : ArcaneFemPoissonObject(mbi)
71  , m_dofs_on_nodes(mbi.subDomain()->traceMng())
72  , m_bsr_format(mbi.subDomain()->traceMng(), *(mbi.subDomain()->acceleratorMng()->defaultQueue()), m_dofs_on_nodes)
73  {
74  ICaseMng* cm = mbi.subDomain()->caseMng();
75  cm->setTreatWarningAsError(true);
76  cm->setAllowUnkownRootElelement(false);
77  }
78 
79  void startInit() override;
80  void compute() override;
81  VersionInfo versionInfo() const override { return VersionInfo(1, 0, 0); }
82 
83  void _assembleBilinearOperator();
84  void _assembleLinearOperatorGpu();
85 
86  private:
87 
88  BSRFormat m_bsr_format;
89  DoFLinearSystem m_linear_system;
90  IItemFamily* m_dof_family = nullptr;
91  FemDoFsOnNodes m_dofs_on_nodes;
92 
93  Real f;
94 
95  String m_petsc_flags;
96  String m_matrix_format = "DOK";
97 
98  bool m_assemble_linear_system = true;
99  bool m_solve_linear_system = true;
100  bool m_cross_validation = false;
101  bool m_hex_quad_mesh = false;
102 
103  void _doStationarySolve();
104  void _getMaterialParameters();
105  void _solve();
106  void _assembleLinearOperatorCpu();
107  void _assembleLinearOperator();
108  void _updateVariables();
109  void _validateResults();
110 
111  RealMatrix<3, 3> _computeElementMatrixTria3(Cell cell);
112  RealMatrix<4, 4> _computeElementMatrixTetra4(Cell cell);
113  RealMatrix<4, 4> _computeElementMatrixQuad4(Cell cell);
114  RealMatrix<8, 8> _computeElementMatrixHexa8(Cell cell);
115  template <int N>
116  void _assembleBilinear(const std::function<RealMatrix<N, N>(const Cell&)>& compute_element_matrix);
117 };
118 
119 #endif
